MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2009 Off Calendar

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of An Adult With A Disability.
Off Calendar Apr-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of an Adult with a Disability.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Karen Farnsworth, #5162.

Stan Casper, Esq. appeared for petitioner Christine Classick, the Guardian Ad Litem for Nicholas Classick.
Order waiving Ms. Classick's appearance at today's hearing was filed March 22, 2010.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $4,950,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $810,775.00.
Costs - $22,979.87.

The net balance of $4,116,245.13 shall be made payable to Christine Classick as Guardian Ad Litem for Nicholas Classick, and Christine Classick individually, and their attorneys, Casper, Meadows, Schwartz & Cook.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of an Adult with a Disability was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2009 Set For Trial On Aug-09-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jul-23-10 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 505
